title: Forced to Wear a Burqa in Kabul: My Life Just Flipped! 😭 #shorts #storytime
script: Mandatory burqa rules in Kabul: my life just flipped upside down.  I'm in Kabul, and they're making us wear burqas every time we step outside. My family's arguing nonstop about it. My mom says it's for our safety, but I feel like I'm disappearing. At school, my friends and I whisper about how unfair it is, but we're all scared. I mean, what if we get caught without one?   Every morning, I stand in front of the mirror, looking at the burqa, feeling trapped. My dad says we have to follow the rules, but I can't shake this feeling of defiance. It's like my identity is being erased. I hear stories of girls getting in trouble, and it terrifies me.   One day, I decide enough is enough. I walk to school without it, heart pounding, eyes scanning for trouble. --I feel eyes on me--, and I know I'm ta
